questions.question: What two distinct capabilities does combining InfoNCE and LM loss train into one model?
options: Ranking (find the right image for a caption) and generation (write a caption for an image)
questions.explanation: InfoNCE handles ranking; LM loss handles generation. CoCa, BLIP, and friends combine both in one training pass.

questions.question: In InfoNCE for a batch of N pairs, how many positive pairs and negative pairs are formed?
options: N positives along the diagonal of the similarity matrix and N*(N-1) negatives off-diagonal
questions.explanation: The N matching pairs sit on the diagonal; everything off-diagonal is a negative.

questions.question: Why is the contrastive temperature usually a learned parameter?
options: Hand-tuning is fragile; letting tau learn allows the model to find the right softmax peakedness as the embedding scale evolves during training
Learned tau is faster on GPU
questions.explanation: CLIP introduced learned log-tau so the contrastive softmax stays in the useful regime as embedding norms grow.

questions.question: Which sub-modules receive gradient from the LM loss but not from the contrastive loss?
questions.explanation: Contrastive loss does not touch the decoder; LM loss does not touch the text-side mean-pool encoder.

questions.question: What does ignore_index=PAD_ID accomplish in the LM cross-entropy?
options: Masks padding positions out of the loss so the model is not punished for predicting tokens after the caption ends
questions.explanation: Padding positions carry no signal; ignoring them stops the loss from learning to predict pad.

questions.question: Why is a 50-step demo on synthetic data enough to call the lesson complete?
options: 该模型在 50 步时达到最先进水平
该演示证明了梯度管道端到端可用；生产训练的形状相同，但在真实数据上运行数百万步
questions.explanation: 所展示的动态（两个损失都下降、无 NaN、tau 稳定）正是十亿图像运行会显示的动态；只是规模更大。
